title: sideritis incana subsp. altiatlantica
intro: Sideritis incana subsp. altiatlantica, also known as the Western Moroccan Ironwort or Wild Marjoram, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis, which is native to the Western Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sideritis incana subsp. altiatlantica include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, Sideritis incana subsp. altiatlantica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
